Sponsorships / BisectHosting

BisectHosting

miscellaneous
Sponsorship and Affiliate
Partnership Varies
affiliate; sponsorship-and-affiliate; sponsorship
Apply Now → Visit Website

Overview

BisectHosting was started in 2011 by Andrew and Max, two friends with a shared passion for Minecraft. They started their own hosting company to help other Minecraft players set up their own servers.

BisectHosting Partner Program

Without content creators, streamers, developers, builders, and many other super-talented individuals in the gaming community, Minecraft and other games would not be where they are today.

BisectHosting is a part of this community and loves to give back through their partnership program.

Program Benefits

  • Generous affiliate payouts with increased commissions for high-volume partners.
  • Discount code to share with your community.
  • Complimentary or heavily discounted services.
  • 24/7/365 priority support on all of your services.
  • Designated and experienced partner management team to help you with advice, strategy, and marketing on your projects.
  • Gain access to partner-only events, such as talks from industry leaders.
  • Complimentary access to our graphics team for you to utilize. They have a list of general requirements for YouTubers, Twitch streamers and website publishers. Visit their application page to learn more.
